opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The side of my head is throbbing so badly I can't sleep, my scalp burns when I brush my hair, and my jaw aches terribly when I try to chew.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A new, excruciating one-sided headache that painkillers aren't touching, and my jaw hurts so much when I eat that I've had to give up on meals.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 5 days ago and hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.character: a severe throbbing ache on one side of my head, near my temple
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so bad I can't sleep; the worst headache I've ever had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right side of my head, around my temple
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time, worse when I lie on that side
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — paracetamol hasn't helped at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: brushing my hair or resting my head on the pillow makes my scalp burn, and chewing makes my jaw ache
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my jaw tires and aches when I chew and eases when I stop; I feel wiped out and a bit feverish; my shoulders feel stiff; I've lost a bit of weight without trying
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, I've never had a headache like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't eat solid food because of my jaw, and the pain is stopping me sleeping

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: the normal amount over the last few days

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives on her own; worried because the pain is severe and she can't manage meals

objective_data_offered.value: I feel hot and a bit sweaty, but I haven't actually taken my temperature
around 70 kg, and I think I've dropped about 2 kg in the last couple of weeks without trying
the skin over my temple feels really tender and sore to touch, and the area looks a bit prominent
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-palpation; not a clinical examination
